title: Europe by Rail — July 2026 (Milan · Amalfi · Bernina · Paris · Barcelona · Madrid)

legs.note: Book a morning flight so Como is doable the same afternoon.
Arrival-afternoon day trip to Lake Como.

By train (preference). Frecciarossa/Italo — but summer-2026 works inflate it to ~7h (not the usual ~4h07). Earliest Italo 07:50→15:03 is the only departure that nearly catches the last direct Positano ferry (15:35) and it's tight; otherwise plan a car transfer Naples→Positano or overnight in Naples. Book trenitalia.com / italotreno.com (Italian domestic not in open APIs).
Direct ferries ~08:35–15:35, ~80–90 min. Aim for 14:05/14:40; book ahead. No public API — operator sites (NLG, Positano.com).
Fly back north (rail still ~7h due to works).

Trenord direct regionale ~2h20 (book trenord.it / Trenitalia). Marked manual: Italian domestic regional isn't in the open APIs, which otherwise misroute this via Switzerland. Position for the Bernina; overnight Tirano.
Bernina Express (panoramic). Seat reservation required + sells out — book on rhb.ch.
AVE ~2.5–3h, frequent. Renfe has no public API — book on renfe.com / Trainline.
